response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior individual contributor with 15+ years of broad full-stack experience, open-source contributions (GISCollective), Linux familiarity, and an active interest in architecture and developer tooling. However, the role is an executive-level Head of Development position requiring German at C1 minimum — the candidate self-reports only Basic German, which is a hard blocker. There is also limited demonstrated experience formally leading and mentoring an interdisciplinary team, no explicit UML/Python proficiency, and the recent career gap plus short tenure at the most recent role weaken the senior-leadership signal.
strengths: Extensive multi-stack engineering background with open-source and Linux exposure
Founder of GISCollective shows architectural ownership and product thinking
Active community involvement via workshops, talks, and teaching
concerns: German listed as Basic — fails the C1 hard requirement
No clear track record of leading/managing an interdisciplinary team at Head-of-Dev scale
Python and UML proficiency are not evidenced in skills or experience
